response.justification: Bogdan is exceptionally talented with deep expertise across all required technologies—TypeScript, full-stack development, clean architecture, modern tooling, and DevOps. However, he is dramatically overqualified for this junior/mid-level entry-level role. As a current Staff Engineer at a major Berlin AI company with 15+ years of senior-level experience, his expectations for responsibility, compensation, and growth would be fundamentally misaligned with the position. This mismatch typically results in rapid turnover and creates poor outcomes for both parties.
strengths: Exceptional full-stack expertise across TypeScript, React, Node.js, and modern DevOps practices with proven ability to work across web, mobile, and backend systems
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship, clean architecture, and testable code—demonstrated through TDD practices, organized workshops, and open-source libraries
Infrastructure and cloud experience with AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines—exceeding all nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Vastly overqualified—currently a Staff Engineer with 15+ years of senior-level roles; far exceeds the junior/entry-level experience profile described
No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed (resume mentions MongoDB, MySQL, and SQL, but not PostgreSQL specifically as required)
Likely retention risk; a Staff Engineer would find the role unchallenging and would probably depart quickly for higher-level opportunities
